channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Biden authorizes Ukraine to use US-supplied longer range missiles for deeper strikes inside Russia
item.description: MANAUS, Brazil (AP) — President Joe Biden has authorized Ukraine to use U.S.-supplied missiles to strike deeper inside Russia, easing limitations on the longer range weapons as Russia deploys thousands of North Korean troops to reinforce its war, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, COLLEEN LONG, ZEKE MILLER, MATTHEW LEE and ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pollster Ann Selzer steps aside in wake of huge Iowa poll miss
item.description: Just before the election, a poll from Selzer sent shockwaves nationwide after it found Vice President Harris leading President-elect Trump in Iowa.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Cruise line offers 4-year journey to 'skip forward' in wake of US presidential election
item.description: While the cruise line doesn't explicitly say the offer was brought on by the election, the two-year option was dubbed the "Mid-Term Selection.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, NewsNation

item.title: Big voter turnout this year benefited Republicans, contradicting conventional political wisdom
item.description: The 2024 presidential election featured sky-high turnout, approaching the historic levels of the 2020 contest and contradicting long-held conventional political wisdom that Republicans struggle to win races in which many people vote.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota election judge faces felony charges over accepting unregistered votes
item.description: An election judge in the state of Minnesota is facing felony charges after allegedly allowing 11 people to vote who did not have the proper documentation on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arab Americans in swing state urge Trump to follow through on promises to end conflict in Gaza
item.description: Leaders in Dearborn, Michigan, are calling on President-elect Trump to use his political influence and attempt to bring a swifter end to the conflict in Gaza and Lebanon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republicans aim to expand slim House majority as final races near finish line
item.description: Five races in the House of Representatives remain uncalled as of Sunday, with Republicans looking to expand their slim majority.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump allies remain in legal peril despite his election victory
item.description: President-elect Trump’s White House victory set his legal cases on a downward spiral, but his allies who have faced prosecution or other legal trouble are not yet in the clear.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about the congressional push to expand some Social Security benefits
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The House has passed legislation that would provide full Social Security benefits to millions of people, pushing it one step closer to becoming law. The Social Security bill on Tuesday won bipartisan support in the House, 327-75, in what is now the lame-duck period for Congress.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Women stock up on abortion pills and Plan B, fearing new restrictions under Trump
item.description: Telehealth providers say requests for the pills have spiked since the election. Patients and doctors worry what a Trump presidency could mean for medical abortion and emergency contraception.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Boden and Elissa Nadworny, MPR News

item.title: Trump names Karoline Leavitt as White House press secretary
item.description: Leavitt, 27, previously served in the Trump White House as assistant press secretary under Kayleigh McEnany, now a leading host on Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida congressional leaders demand answers from FEMA political scandal
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (WFLA) - Republican and Democratic leaders on Capitol Hill are preparing for a hearing next week with FEMA administrator Deanne Criswell, regarding alleged political discrimination after hurricanes Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: President-elect Trump brings South Dakota politicians into national spotlight
item.description: While the next four years of President-elect Donald Trump’s administration are still being constructed, South Dakota politicians are being brought into a larger national conversation.
item.dc:creator: Phil Picardi, Heidi Raschke, and Lukas Levin, MPR News

item.title: Here's how much White House Cabinet members make
item.description: A president's Cabinet is an advisory group of people who make up the heads of the 15 executive departments.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Outspent 4-to-1, Republicans still made gains in state legislative elections
item.description: Despite outspending Republicans, Democrats didn’t achieve some ambitious goals in state legislative races. The GOP continues to control more legislatures, though Democrats notched some victories.
item.dc:creator: Ryland Barton, MPR News

item.title: Trump meets with Argentina's president, the first foreign leader he's met with since election
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump met Thursday at his Mar-a-Lago club with Argentine President Javier Milei, the first foreign leader to meet with the president-elect since his victory in last week's election.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Appeals court allows Indiana gender-affirming care ban to remain in effect
item.description: Indiana’s Republican Gov. Eric Holcomb signed the law, Senate Bill 480, last spring, one day after he called the measure “clear as mud.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, Fox 5

item.title: Trump chooses anti-vaccine activist Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as health secretary
item.description: A longtime vaccine skeptic, Kennedy is an attorney who has built a loyal following over several decades of people who admire his lawsuits against major pesticide and pharmaceutical companies. He has pushed for tighter regulations around the ingredients in foods.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Satire slinger The Onion buys Alex Jones' Infowars at auction with help from Sandy Hook families
item.description: The satirical news publication The Onion won the bidding for Alex Jones’ Infowars at a bankruptcy auction, backed by families of Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting victims whom Jones owes more than $1 billion in defamation judgments for calling the massacre a hoax, the families announced Thursday
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Thousands of votes never counted across Nevada due to signature issues
item.description: More than 9,000 mail-in ballots across Nevada were not counted because voters did not verify their signatures before the curing deadline, according to data the 8 News Now Investigators reviewed.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cannizzaro, Yeager to continue leadership roles in Nevada Senate, Assembly
item.description: Democratic Nevada State Senator Nicole Cannizzaro will serve for a fourth consecutive legislative session as Senate Majority Leader. Democrat Assembly Speaker Steve Yeager was also reelected.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Bleakley, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump's picks so far: Here's who will be advising the new president
item.description: Donald Trump has begun selecting people to fill top administration jobs in Washington upon returning to the Oval Office in January. Trump beat Vice President Kamala Harris in the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk responds after 'SNL' star claims he made her cry
item.description: In a now-deleted TikTok post, "Saturday Night Live" star Chloe Fineman said that Elon Musk made her cry when he hosted the show.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sweeney, Fox 5

item.title: Speaker Mike Johnson: Republicans 'ready to deliver' on Trump's agenda
item.description: Congress returns to a changed Washington as President-elect Donald Trump’s hard-right agenda is quickly taking shape, buoyed by eager Republican allies eyeing a full sweep of power on Capitol Hill while Democrats are sorting out what went wrong.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro, WGN 9

item.title: Supreme Court will not hear challenge to Jan. 6 ‘parading’ charge
item.description: The Supreme Court said Tuesday it will not consider a challenge to a misdemeanor charge used against scores of Jan. 6, 2021, rioters for unlawfully "parading” in the Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Trump asks Rep. Mike Waltz, China hawk, to be his national security adviser
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked U.S. Rep. Michael Waltz, a retired Army National Guard officer and war veteran, to be his national security adviser, a person familiar with the matter said Monday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Will Trump's hush money conviction stand? A judge will rule on the president-elect's immunity claim
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A gut punch for most defendants, Donald Trump turned his criminal conviction into a rallying cry. His supporters put “I’m Voting for the Felon” on T-shirts, hats and lawn signs. “The real verdict is going to be Nov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: What exit polls tell us about Trump's victory over Harris
item.description: CHICAGO — From ordinary blue collar workers to seasoned political hands to members of the clergy, many Americans are combing through the election results trying to make sense of the outcome.
item.dc:creator: Tahman Bradley, WGN 9

item.title: Trump says he'll nominate Elise Stefanik as UN ambassador
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has tapped Rep. Elise Stefanik (R-N.Y.) to serve as ambassador to the United Nations, choosing one of his staunchest allies in the House to take on a top diplomatic post.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC
